positive: A stylized, minimalist scene featuring a playful collection of diverse, stylized celestial bodies and whimsical nature elements floating in deep cosmic ink blue and vibrant teal. The main subjects include abstract representations of smiling moons, stylized comets leaving colorful trails, miniature constellations formed by glowing geometric lines, and floating, bioluminescent flora (like stylized ferns and lily pads). The composition must be centrally balanced, designed as a repeat seamless pattern element, with clean, distinct silhouettes and high contrast. Use a vibrant, graphic illustration style reminiscent of mid-century Scandinavian folk art meets ethereal abstract concept art. The background should be a subtle gradient dark navy blue, ensuring the foreground elements pop. Lighting is dramatic and conceptual, utilizing soft glow effects (emissive light) emanating from the celestial objects and flora, contrasted against deep, rich shadows. Highly scalable for screen printing or embroidery, with clear separation of positive and negative space.
negative: blur, noise, text, signature, watermark, low quality, artifacts, amateur, dirty, messy, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, ugly, photorealistic, hyperdetailed, excessive realism, messy lines
